gate.subtitle: Your digital self · Private Node
gate.biometric_prompt_pwa: Unlock with Face ID or fingerprint.
gate.save_creds_hint: Password and Soul-Cert are encrypted on this device — unlockable only with your biometrics.
gate.footer: Local node · everything stays on this device

error.creds_load_failed: Could not load credentials. Please sign in manually.
error.cert_expired: Credentials expired. Please sign in manually.
error.cert_required: Soul-Cert required. Please enter your cert.
error.invalid_cert: Soul-Cert invalid. The cert was cleared — sign in with password only, then issue a new one in the Admin tab.
error.invalid_invite: Invite code invalid or expired. Ask the node admin for the current code (Settings → Invite).
error.gate_not_configured: Node not configured. Run init.sh again.
error.access_denied: Access denied. Please check password and cert.
error.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

join.subtitle: Multi-Hoster Node
join.heading: New here
join.intro: Enter the node password and your invite code to register your soul on this node.
join.footer: Your soul stays on this node

error.invalid_invite: Invite code invalid or expired. Ask the node admin for the current code (Settings → Invite).
error.access_denied: Access denied. Check password and invite code.
error.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

home.hero_sub: Your node on the internet. As a human. Talk to your AI, connect with peers — the Soul Archivist writes silently alongside.
home.not_available: This view is not available yet.

index.landing_sub: Personal identity layer for AI systems. Portable. Encrypted.
index.login_modal_sub: Load your Soul file — stored locally, never leaves this device.
index.login_modal_sub_import: No Soul is registered on this node yet. Your existing sys.md will be imported and re-anchored here.
index.recovery_msg: This Soul is already registered on this server, but the cert in the file is outdated. You can reset the registration — vault data is preserved.
index.pwa_ios_hint: Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen
index.pwa_hint: Offline capable · No gate on next launch
index.logout_msg: Remove Soul from browser? Your file is preserved.

error.node_locked: This node is already assigned to another Soul.
error.no_soul_id: No soul_id found in file. Valid sys.md required.

chat.hold_to_speak: Hold to speak → release to send
chat.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes — verify important information.
chat.shared_files_banner: {n} file{plural} in vault/shared — save to device if needed
chat.mic_not_found: No microphone found — please connect an audio device.
chat.mic_no_access: Microphone access unavailable — HTTPS or browser support missing.
chat.preflight_brave_body:
For AI web search to work:
1. brave.com/search/api → free key (2,000 searches/month)
2. Settings → API Keys → add Brave Search
chat.preflight_wavespeed_body:
For image generation to work:
1. wavespeed.ai → create account → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add WaveSpeed key
chat.preflight_agent_body:
To create your voice agent:
1. elevenlabs.io → create account → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add ElevenLabs key
chat.preflight_stt_body:
1. elevenlabs.io → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add ElevenLabs key
chat.preflight_voice_agent_body:
Set up your voice agent first:
1. elevenlabs.io → create account → copy API key
2. Settings → API Keys → add ElevenLabs key
3. Enter `{'@'}create-agent` to create your agent
chat.preflight_no_agent_body: First create your personal voice agent with `{'@'}create-agent`.
chat.mic_denied: Microphone access denied — please allow in browser settings.
chat.agent_no_voice_clone: No voice clone — no audio in vault or vault was locked during creation. Unlock vault and run `{'@'}create-agent` again.
chat.diagnose_errors: **{n} entries** in OpenResty error log (newest first):
chat.peer_ambiguous: Ambiguous: {names} — please use the full name.
chat.pin_jwt_next:
Next steps:
1. Access: `{'@'}pin free` or `{'@'}pin paid 0.001 0xWallet [7d]`
   → number = token validity in days (1–30, default: 1)
2. Publish: `{'@'}pin publish {'<'}your-name{'>'}`
   → takes approx. 5–15 seconds (IPFS upload)
chat.pin_free_body:
Every AI assistant can read your soul.
Which tools should be enabled?
chat.pin_confirm_no_tags: Tags: *(none)* — important for soul_discover: `{'@'}pin publish Name | Desc | Tag1,Tag2`
chat.pin_access_free: Access: Free (all AI agents can read your soul)
chat.pin_access_unconfigured: Access: not configured  →  `{'@'}pin free` or `{'@'}pin paid …`
chat.img_boundary_violation: This prompt violates the boundaries defined in mind.md.
chat.search_brave_key: Brave Search API key missing — add in Settings (brave.com/search/api · Free: 2,000/month).
chat.elevenlabs_key_inline: ElevenLabs API key missing — add in Settings.
chat.wavespeed_key_inline: WaveSpeed API key missing — add in Settings.
chat.pin_tools_select: **Select tools** — click to select, click again to deselect:
chat.search_no_query: Please enter a search query: `{'@'}search What is …`

session_page.vault_encrypted: Soul encrypted on server · unlock Vault with key phrases

verify.subtitle: Identity verification
verify.login_required_desc: Please sign in to the SYS app first.
verify.invalid_challenge_desc: This verification request has expired or is invalid.
verify.verification_done: ✓ Verification complete — the agent now recognizes you.
verify.choose_methods_desc: Choose one or more methods — each raises the score.
verify.fingerprint_desc: Identity verification via Face ID, Touch ID or Windows Hello.
verify.face_desc: Camera frame will be compared with your vault profile image.
verify.hold_face: Hold your face to the camera.
verify.analyzing_face: Claude Vision is analyzing your face.
verify.voice_desc: Your voice will be compared to vault audio (FFT spectral analysis).
verify.no_blockchain_anchor_found: No blockchain anchor found. Soul must be anchored first.

motion.vault_hint: Connect vault to save the motion pattern permanently.

face_prompts.text: Neutral — look straight into the camera

face_prompts.sub: Corners of mouth down, eyebrows up

body_prompts.sub: Head to toe fully in frame?

body_prompts.text: Neutral stance — arms relaxed at sides
Take a seated position if possible

motion.consent_desc: Camera recording is saved locally in your vault and only leaves your device when you explicitly share it.
motion.consent_check: I consent to the recording of my face and motion data (GDPR Art. 7, Art. 9)

decrypt.title: Import Vault
decrypt.words_prose: Enter your 12 words in the correct order — exactly as when you encrypted.
decrypt.local_vault_prose: Choose a local folder to link the dashboard.
decrypt.local_vault_prose_files: Choose a local folder to save {n} vault file(s) and link the dashboard.

encrypt.title: Export Soul
encrypt.words_prose: Choose 12 words — English, German or mixed. Letters only, no numbers. Only you know them.
encrypt.warning: These 12 words are your only key. Write them offline — they cannot be recovered.
encrypt.confirm_prose: Last check. After this the vault will be encrypted and saved as a .soul file.
encrypt.confirmed_text: I have safely written all 12 words offline.
encrypt.success_sub: sys.md · Images · Voice · Motion · AES-256-GCM · 12 words
encrypt.soul_downloaded: Your .soul file was downloaded. Keep it safe — it contains your encrypted vault.
encrypt.vps_warning: {n} VPS file(s) could not be loaded (vault session expired or timeout). Only local files were included.
encrypt.words_required: All 12 fields must contain valid words.

vault.sync_confirm_text: You are about to upload your local vault to the server. The following content will be transferred and existing server files will be replaced:
vault.confirm_delete_msg: "{name}" will be permanently deleted from the shared area.
vault.vault_locked: Vault is locked or key missing. Please open the vault first (Vault access → unlock).
vault.sync_success: sys.md + vault files uploaded to server ✓

settings.title: Settings
settings.agent_cron_desc: Claude Code runs on this server on a schedule and works through tasks from the queue. No SSH needed — write tasks in the chat, the agent handles them.
settings.agent_not_installed_hint: Run init.sh and select the Agent setup step to install Claude Code automatically.
settings.agent_queue_desc: Add tasks here — the agent picks them up on the next run.
settings.agent_queue_placeholder: agent.md content is shown here — add markdown tasks for the agent.
settings.agent_no_api_key: No Anthropic API key — configure in the API tab first.
settings.agent_mcp_token_missing_hint: The agent runner no longer has its own service token. Create one now.
settings.health_sync_info: Health sync device affects how data is interpreted. All models use the Garmin Connect API.
settings.health_sync_not_configured: Not configured — save credentials first, then run: bash /opt/sys/health-sync/install.sh
settings.apple_health_info: For Apple Health, the Health-Sync app must be installed on your iPhone. Setup is done via SSH (install.sh).
settings.oura_info: Oura Ring API token is configured via SSH in the health_sync configuration.
settings.biometric_update_failed: Biometric credentials could not be updated — re-save once on next login.
settings.master_key_rotation: Master key rotation affects this instance. Grace period 15 min — after that old certs are invalid.
settings.cert_rotation_failed: Cert rotation failed — please reload the page and try again.
settings.admin_connect_desc: Enter the admin token you received during server setup. It is only stored locally in the browser.
settings.token_renewed_agent_failed: Token renewed ✓ · Agent update failed ({err}) — recreate agent
settings.master_key_rotated: Master key & cert rotated ✓ — sys.md downloaded. You remain logged in.
settings.master_key_cert_failed: Master key rotated — cert rotation failed. Renew manually in API tab.
settings.soul_not_loaded: Soul not loaded — please reload the page.
settings.webhook_rotate_msg: The ElevenLabs agent will be automatically updated with the new token. If that fails, a notice will appear.
settings.invite_desc: Share an invite code with a new user. The code allows them to register their Soul on this node. It rotates automatically after each registration.
settings.invite_not_generated: Not generated yet — rotate to create one.
settings.invite_hint: The code rotates automatically after a new Soul registers. You can also rotate it manually to invalidate the current code.

files.title: Your context,
files.confirm_delete_shared: "{name}" will be permanently deleted from the shared area.

health.title: How your body
health.lede: Health tracks vital signals of your daily life — heart rate, sleep, movement. Not perfection, but continuity.
health.not_configured_desc: Connect your fitness tracker to automatically sync vital data.
health.food_one_day: Only one day logged — chart grows with more entries
health.tip_active_good: {n} of 7 days — good, more is better
health.tip_nutrition_excellent: Very good quality — keep it up
health.tip_nutrition_good: Solid base, more whole foods helps
health.tip_nutrition_mid: More vegetables & water, fewer processed foods
health.sync_status_rate_limit: Garmin is throttling logins (rate limit). Please wait 2–4 hours and try again.
health.sync_status_mfa_required: Garmin requires MFA verification. Run once: python3 /opt/sys/health-sync/garmin_login.py
health.sync_status_auth_error: Garmin login failed — check email or password in Health Settings.
health.sync_status_install_error: Health Sync not installed — run: bash /opt/sys/health-sync/install.sh
health.sync_status_unknown: Sync error — see server log for details.

vault_session.title: Vault access
vault_session.prose: Time window for external services. Only when the Vault is open can connected services access your Soul data. You control the duration.
vault_session.unlimited_info: Unlimited: Vault stays open until locked manually.
vault_session.biometric_methods: Face ID · Touch ID · Windows Hello · Device screen lock
vault_session.method_warning: Your Vault was last opened with "{method}". Switching methods requires re-encrypting all files.

setup.title: Set up Soul
setup.vault_connect_hint: Connect vault via local or cloud
setup.vault_delete_desc: The soul on the server will be deleted and cannot be restored.
setup.connect_vault_msg: The browser will get permanent read and write access to the selected folder. You can disconnect at any time.
setup.delete_vault_msg: The soul on the server will be deleted and cannot be restored. The local vault connection will also be removed.
setup.pinata_desc: For IPFS publishing and blockchain anchoring.
setup.cfg_test_failed: Saved · Server connection test failed — key may still be valid
setup.cfg_wrong_status: Saved, but Anthropic returned {status} — check key

marketplace.step1_prose: Specify whether other people’s AI assistants can access your Soul for free or for payment. Find access code and MCP peers under Peers.
marketplace.mode_free_desc: Every AI assistant can read your Soul data — without restriction.
marketplace.mode_pay_desc: Per access, a POL amount is automatically transferred to you.
marketplace.field_dynamic_pricing_hint: Price grows with Genesis Chain age, anchor count and buyer demand (last 30d)
marketplace.live_price_save_first: Save settings to see live price
marketplace.free_mode_state: Every AI assistant can read your Soul data for free.
marketplace.step2_prose: Pins ERC-8004 metadata via Pinata. Your Soul then appears in the Marketplace and is discoverable by external agents.
marketplace.pinata_missing: Pinata JWT missing — please add it in settings
marketplace.field_tags_hint: Keywords for soul_discover — AI and people find you with them (comma-separated)
marketplace.hero_sub: Make your Soul accessible to external AI assistants — via MCP tools, free or for POL. After that it's discoverable in the Marketplace.

anchor.title: Anchor soul
anchor.mobile_hint: Wallet connection on mobile may respond slowly — we're working on it. For the best experience we recommend a desktop browser.
anchor.need_session: At least one real session required. Complete an enrichment.
anchor.tx_pending: Transaction in progress — please confirm in your wallet app.
anchor.rate_limit_active: Rate limit active — next anchor possible:
anchor.proof_text: Cryptographic proof: this wallet owns this soul · {count} anchors since {since}
anchor.lede: Write a cryptographic fingerprint of your soul on-chain — an irrevocable timestamp that proves your identity.
anchor.connect_wallet_note: Connect a wallet first to anchor. At least one real session is required.

services.title: Connected services
services.prose_1: Each service gets its own service token. This token goes as
services.prose_2: in the webhook header of external services. Access only when vault session is open.
services.usage_hint: Add as Authorization header in the service:
services.err_vault_locked_hint: The vault session on the server has expired. Please lock and reopen in the vault panel.
services.err_key_wrong_hint: The vault was opened with a different key than sys.md was encrypted with. Lock vault, open with the original key (12 words) and re-sync.
services.err_no_sync_hint: sys.md has not been synced to the server yet. Run Sync in Vault Explorer.
services.revoke_msg: "{name}" really revoke? The token becomes invalid immediately.

calendar.no_entries: No entries for this day yet.
calendar.lede_1: Sessions, vault entries and anchorings — mirrored to the month.
calendar.lede_2: Tap a day to add your own entries.

first_setup.lede_import_1: Your imported Soul received a new admin token for this VPS — it is shown
first_setup.lede_init_1: This instance was just initialized. Your admin token was generated — it is shown
first_setup.warn_text: Save the token now in a password manager. Without it you cannot rotate keys or administer the instance.
first_setup.confirm_label: I have saved the token securely.
first_setup.lede_soul: Your newly generated sys.md contains the cert for this server. You can save it now — or import an existing Soul.
first_setup.dl_desc: New Soul for this VPS — cert will be entered automatically.
first_setup.import_desc: Upload sys.md from a previous VPS — cert will be reissued for this VPS.

sync.title: Sync
sync.lede: {count} sections differ between this device and the server.

emergency.lvl1_desc: Chat, Soul update and BeME are blocked. All other features continue.
emergency.lvl2_desc: Level 1 + WaveSpeed image generation stopped. No AI requests possible.
emergency.lvl3_desc: Level 2 + MCP server stopped. Node still responds but completely AI-free.

maturity.skills_empty: Add outstanding skills to your Soul — that increases the value
maturity.lede: Maturity measures the depth and consistency of your identity — not activity, but substance. It grows through genuine dialogue, rich context and anchoring.

create_soul.title: Create Soul
create_soul.lede: No name, no email — just a hash that belongs to you.
create_soul.idea_placeholder: Who is this soul in one sentence?

earnings.lede: Every access by external AI agents to your Soul is verified on-chain. Here you see all transactions, earnings and the status of your release.
earnings.empty_enabled: No accesses yet. Agents find your Soul via soul_discover and access via soul_pay_read.
earnings.empty_disabled: Agent access is not activated yet. Configure your access in the Marketplace.
earnings.export_sub: All earnings as CSV — includes TX hash, wallet, POL amount, date. Suitable for tax declaration.

peers.lede: Direct, encrypted connections to other nodes. Mention them with {'@'} in the session, share media or send to all.
peers.empty: No connected souls yet. Add your first peer.
peers.err_handshake_network: Network error during handshake — peer probably unreachable.

connect.tagline:
Personal identity layer for AI systems.
Portable. Encrypted.
connect.waiting_hint: The node owner must approve the connection.
connect.rejected_hint: The owner did not approve the connection.
connect.expired_hint: Please scan a new QR code.
connect.err_no_token: No valid token in the URL.

agent_sandbox.desc: What external AI agents see about you — the rest of sys.md stays private.
agent_sandbox.placeholder: Write freely here — as Markdown or plain text. e.g.: »Hello, I'm Jan from Marburg. I appreciate messages.«

api_context.public_vault_desc: Applies to Public Vault — what external services and connected souls may see.
api_context.title: API Context

audio_capture.consent_desc: Your voice sample is stored locally in your vault and only leaves your device when you explicitly share it.
audio_capture.consent_checkbox: I consent to the recording and, if applicable, processing for voice clone creation (EU AI Act Art. 50, GDPR Art. 9)
audio_capture.idle_hint: Speak freely for at least 30 sec for optimal quality

voice_recorder.consent_text: I consent to this recording being processed for AI voice clone creation (EU AI Act Art. 50, GDPR Art. 9). Processing is carried out exclusively by me.
voice_recorder.idle_hint: Speak freely for at least 30 sec for optimal quality
voice_recorder.no_vault_hint: Connect vault to save the voice sample permanently.

live_profile.consent_desc: Voice, face and motion are stored in your local vault and can optionally be linked to your digital Soul. The data only leaves your device when you explicitly share it.
live_profile.consent_checkbox: I consent to the recording of my voice, face and motion data and acknowledge that these are stored exclusively in my local vault.
live_profile.gdpr_note: GDPR Art. 7 – revocable at any time by closing this panel

link.err_disabled_sub: This link was deactivated by its owner.
link.err_invalid_sub: The link is not valid or has expired.

chronicle.title: Chronicle
chronicle.subtitle: Session log
chronicle.lede: Every session, chronologically. Anchored entries are cryptographically signed on Polygon — irrevocable.

connection.lede: Share your MCP endpoint via QR code. When an AI wants to verify your identity, the request appears here.
connection.qr_hint: Show this QR code to someone to scan
connection.probe_hint: Do you want to allow the connection?
connection.info_desc: When an AI application wants to verify your identity, a request appears above. The verification — via fingerprint, face or voice — opens in a secure window.

pin_tools.verify_human_desc: Confirms a human is behind the soul
pin_tools.audio_get_desc: Single audio file from the vault
pin_tools.audio_list_desc: All audio files in the vault
pin_tools.context_list_desc: All context files in the vault
pin_tools.health_check_desc: Body metrics, sleep, activity from health.md
